messages.content:
pip install httpx==0.23.1 aiohttp -U ray[serve,default] vllm
zsh: no matches found: ray[serve,default]

`zsh` is treating `ray[serve,default]` as a glob pattern because of the square brackets. Quote or escape it.

Use one of these:

```sh
pip install httpx==0.23.1 aiohttp -U "ray[serve,default]" vllm
```

or

```sh
pip install httpx==0.23.1 aiohttp -U ray\[serve,default\] vllm
```

If you want to avoid this behavior globally in zsh:

```sh
setopt NO_NOMATCH
```

(or temporarily for one command: `noglob pip install ...`).
